about.label: About Us
about.paragraph1: Home Garden Manual was born from a simple belief: everyone deserves access to the knowledge that transforms outdoor spaces into living sanctuaries. Whether you have a sprawling backyard or a modest balcony, we're here to guide your journey.
about.paragraph2: Our team of passionate gardeners, horticulturists, and designers brings together decades of experience to create content that's both beautiful and practical. We believe in sustainable practices, native plants, and the therapeutic power of connecting with nature.
about.paragraph3: From detailed care guides to inspiring design ideas, every article is crafted with love and attention to detail. Join our growing community of plant enthusiasts and discover the joy of gardening.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: The Home Garden Manual website respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.section2Text: We may collect the following information:
privacy.section2Item1: Email address (when you subscribe to our newsletter)
privacy.section2Item2: Browsing data and cookies (to improve your experience)
privacy.section2Item3: Technical information such as IP address, browser type, and device
privacy.section2Item4: Interaction data with ads displayed on the site
privacy.section3Title: 3. Use of Cookies and Tracking Technologies
privacy.section3Text: We use cookies and similar technologies to personalize content, display relevant ads, and analyze site traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.section4Text1: This site uses Google AdSense to display ads. Google and its advertising partners may use cookies to display ads based on previous visits to our site or other sites on the internet.
privacy.section4Text2: You can disable personalized advertising by visiting
privacy.section5Text: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties, except when necessary to comply with the law, enforce our policies, or protect our rights.
privacy.section6Text: Under the General Data Protection Law (LGPD), you have the right to:
privacy.section6Item3: Request the deletion of your data
privacy.section6Item5: Request the portability of your data
privacy.section7Text: We implement security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.section8Text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us through the
privacy.section9Text: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the update date.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using the Home Garden Manual website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you should not use our site.
terms.section2Text: Home Garden Manual is an informative website dedicated to providing tips, guides, and educational content about gardening, indoor plants, landscaping, and topics related to plant cultivation.
terms.section3Text1: All content on this site, including texts, images, graphics, logos, and design, is the property of Home Garden Manual or its licensors and is protected by copyright laws.
terms.section3Item1: View and print pages for personal and non-commercial use
terms.section3Item3: Reproduce, duplicate, or copy material for commercial purposes
terms.section3Item4: Modify or create derivative works from our content
terms.section4Text: By using our site, you agree to:
terms.section4Item1: Not use the site for illegal or unauthorized purposes
terms.section4Item2: Not attempt to access restricted areas of the site
terms.section4Item3: Not transmit viruses or malicious code
terms.section4Item4: Not interfere with the security or operation of the site
terms.section5Text1: The content of this site is provided for informational and educational purposes only. While we strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of the content for any specific purpose.
terms.section5Text2: We are not responsible for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages resulting from the use of information contained on this site.
terms.section6Text: Our site may contain links to third-party sites. We have no control over the content or practices of these sites and are not responsible for them. The inclusion of links does not imply endorsement.
terms.section7Text: This site displays ads provided by Google AdSense and other advertising partners. The ads displayed may be based on your interests and browsing history. See our
terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section9Text: These terms are governed by the laws of Brazil. Any disputes will be resolved in the competent courts of Brazil.
terms.section10Text: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us through our

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.section1Text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or smartphone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to website owners.
cookiePolicy.section2Item1: Ensure the proper functioning of the site
cookiePolicy.essentialCookiesDesc: Necessary for the basic operation of the site. Without them, the site would not work properly.
cookiePolicy.performanceCookiesDesc: Collect information about how visitors use the site, such as which pages are most visited. We use Google Analytics for this.
cookiePolicy.functionalCookiesDesc: Allow the site to remember choices you make, such as language or region preferences.
cookiePolicy.advertisingCookiesDesc: Used to display relevant ads to you. Include cookies from Google AdSense and advertising partners.
cookiePolicy.section4Text: We use third-party services that may set cookies on your device:
cookiePolicy.section4Item2Desc: For traffic analysis and user behavior
cookiePolicy.section4Text2: These third parties may use cookies to track your online activities across different sites for targeted advertising purposes.
cookiePolicy.section5Text: You can control and manage cookies in several ways:
cookiePolicy.section5Item1Desc: Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies through settings
cookiePolicy.section5NoteText: Blocking all cookies may affect site functionality and your browsing experience.
cookiePolicy.section6Text: Links to manage cookies in the most popular browsers:
cookiePolicy.section7Text: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. We recommend that you review this page regularly to stay informed about how we use cookies.
cookiePolicy.section8Text: If you have questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact us through the
